hooks.command: node -e "const inp=require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8');const tool=JSON.parse(inp);const cmd=tool.tool_input?.command||'';if(/git (add|commit)/.test(cmd)){const {execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('pytest -m "not integration" -q',{stdio:'inherit'});execSync('ruff check .',{stdio:'inherit'});}catch(e){console.error('Tests or lint failed — commit blocked.');process.exit(2);}}"
